sql.query: SELECT CASE ev.accounttype WHEN 'A' THEN '1. Assets' WHEN 'L' THEN '2. Liabilities' WHEN 'O' THEN '3. Equity' END AS category, ev.value || ' - ' || ev.name AS account, SUM(fa.amtacctdr) - SUM(fa.amtacctcr) AS amount FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND ev.accounttype IN ('A', 'L', 'O') AND ev.issummary = 'N' GROUP BY ev.accounttype, ev.value, ev.name HAVING ABS(SUM(fa.amtacctdr) - SUM(fa.amtacctcr)) > 0.01 ORDER BY category, ev.value
